titleStmt.title: SII 24.23: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 23. (A.R. No. 333 of 1952-53.) CHAKRATTĀḺVĀR SHRINE, PILLARS OF THE VERANDAH.

summary.p: Damaged. Commences with the praśasti Tiṅgaḷēr-taru etc. Seems to record a gift of gold by a Mūvēndavēḷār. Mentions a certain Brahmamārāyar. Some of the pillars on which the inscription seems to have been engraved in continuation are built into the wall. The record is dated in the 30th regnal year of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiṅkaḷer taru taṉṟoṅkal veṇkuṭaik kiḻ nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇarntu ceṅkoloccik karuṅkali kaṭintu taṉ ciṟiya tātaiyum tiruttamaiyaṉu Iḷaṅkokkaḷaim neṟiyuṇar taṉṟirupputalva
raiyum tuṉṟeḻil vāṉavaṉ miṉavaṉ vaṉ kaṅka Ilaṅkaiyaṟ kiraivaṉ pulaṅkaḻal pallavaṉ kaṉṉa kucciyar kāvala nenap poṉ maṇimakuṭam cūṭṭi paṭar pukaḻ Āṅkavaṟ kavar nāṭaruḷi pāṅkuṟa maṉṉu pallūḻiyuḷ teṉṉa

var mūvaruḷ mānāparaṇaṉ poṉmuṭi Ānā paru [ maṇippacun=talai] pporukaḷattarintu vāraḷaviyakaḻal vira keraḷaṉai muṉaivaiyiṟp piṭittu
t tantivāraṇak kaṭakkaḷiṟṟāl Utaippittaruḷi Antamil perum pukaḻ cun=tara pāṇṭiyaṉ Oṟṟai veṇ kuṭaiyum kaṟṟai veṇ kavariyum ciṅkā

taṉamum veṅkaḷattiḻantu taṉmuṭi viḻat talai virit taṭitaḷarntoṭat to
llaiyil mullaiyūr turatti Olakalil veṇāṭṭaraicai ceṇāṭṭotukki mevupu

Añcaṟ kevutaṉ ṟāṅkarum paṭaiyālāṅkavaṉ ceṉaiyuḷ kaṇṭappaiyanum kaṅkātaraṉum vaṇṭamarkaḷiṟṟoṭu maṭiyattiṇṭiṟa
l virutarai vikkiyum vicaiyātittaṉum tarumuraṭkāṅkamaiyanum mutaliṉar śamarabhīru vottuṭaiya nimir cuṭar ponno

ṭaiyṅkari puraviyoṭum piṭittut taṉṉāṭaiyil cayaṅkoṇṭu tu—
ṉṉār koḷḷippākkai Uḷḷeri maṭuppit torutani

tt(ā)ṇṭāl porutirai Uṭutta Ilaṅkaiyar koṉ makaṉ vikkiramapākuviṉ makuṭamum muṉṟe
ṉakkuṭaiyat teṟṟamiḻ maṇṭala muḻuvatum Iḻantu Eḻ kaṭal liḷam pukkilaṅ
kecanākiya vikkirama pāṇṭiyan parumaṇimakuṭamu kāṇṭaku tannatākiya kaṉṉakucciyar
Ārkali Īḻam ciriteṉṟeṇṇi Uḷaṅkoḷ nāṭu taṉṉuṟavoṭum pukuntu payilum viḷaṅku muṭi kavitta vīracalāmekaṉ porkaḷattañcik kāṟkaḷiṟiḻantu kavvaiyiṟṟoṭik kātaliyoṭum

vativaṇṭalar teriyal maticūtaneṉ ṟeṉaip palavaraicarai muṉaivaiyiṟṟuratti vampalar tarupo
ḻil kampilinakaruḷ caḷukkiyar māḷikai takarppit tiḷakkamil villavar mīṉa(na)var veḻ kulac caḷukkiyar
vallavar kaucalar vaṅkaṇar koṅkaṇar cintu ra yyaṇar ciṅkaḷar paṅkaiyāntaṇar mutaliḷa

loṉṟa
var mukantu koḷakkuṭuttu viśvalokam viḷaṅka manu neṟi niṉṟa [ Aśvame]

matam ceytaraicu viṟṟirunta jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa
ṉ Uyarnta perumpukaḻ śrī kovirā

jakesari panmarāna Uṭaiyār śrīrājādhirājadevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 Āvatu
Ikkācu nūṟṟu
brahmārāyar

ttamu ppoṉ Irupattoru kaḻañce vūr cāttaṉ muventaveḷār Āḻvār cipaṇṭā
mukkālum koṇṭa paricāvatu yāṇṭu ttāl koṇṭa poṉ cey mukkāl Ippon Irupattu

tittaṟ pakkal Isabhaiyom Ikkācu nūṟṟu muppatum koṇṭu Innilattil leci nāl vanta per kā
ṅkoṇṭu Impattile paṇṇakkaṭavom (1/2) taraṅkaḷināl vanta nilam Araimāviṉ kīḻ mūṉṟu

brahmamārāyar māran
tiruvaraṅkattu Aḻaki

ṉṉum patine vaiṣṇavarka
ṉūṟṟu muppatu

taḷamiraṇṭum kaḻañciṉ vaḻi muṉṟu mañcāṭiyāka Āṇṭu varai vanta palicai Uḷḷaṭaṅka nāyiṟu mutal kaḻañciṉ vāyt tiṅ
Iraṇṭu māvum me vamutuceytaruḷa ttu veṇṭuvaṉavaṟṟukku yeymañcāṭiyu
māmukkāṇi muntirikaik kīḻ Iraṇṭu māvukkum me
yamaṇavāḷan maṭatti(li)le Ūṭṭuvippatāka śrī
Digital edition of SII 24.23 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
